pages.title: About | Michelle Welsh MP
pages.meta_description: Information about the Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest.
pages.text_excerpt: --> About | Michelle Welsh MP top of page 0115 646 6219 MICHELLE WELSH MP About Help & Advice Updates Constituency Parliamentary In the News Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Michelle Welsh MP Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest I’m Michelle Welsh, the Labour Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest. ​ I was born and raised in Nottinghamshire, and my roots here shape everything I do in Parliament. ​ Before being elected to Parliament in 2024, I served our community as a councillor and have worked in education, adult social care and local government. Those experiences gave me a deep understanding of the challenges and strengths of our local communities - from supporting families and improving education to strengthening local services. ​ In Westminster, I’m focused on tackling health inequalities and improving maternity care through my work as the Chair of both the All-Party Parliamentary Groups on Maternity and Polycystic Ovary Syndrome. ​ My approach to politics is simple - I believe in service to my constituents, fairness, and giving a strong voice to local people. Every decision I make is guided by that commitment to making life better for our communities across Sherwood Forest and beyond. ​ If you have any questions, please do get in touch. Sign up to my newsletter bottom of page

pages.title: Help & Advice | Michelle Welsh MP
pages.meta_description: Information on about to get help and advice from the Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest.
pages.text_excerpt: --> Help & Advice | Michelle Welsh MP top of page 0115 646 6219 MICHELLE WELSH MP About Help & Advice Updates Constituency Parliamentary In the News Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Help & Advice Get in touch if you require my assistance with your case. Alternatively, there are some useful contact details below. If you need help or would like to raise an issue, my team and I are here to support you. ​ Please note that, due to Parliamentary rules, I can only assist people who live in the Sherwood Forest constituency. You can check who your MP is here . ​ You can get in touch by emailing me at michelle.welsh.mp@parliament.uk or by calling my constituency office on 0115 646 6219. ​ To help us deal with your enquiry as quickly as possible, please include the following details in your message: ​ Your full name Your home address (including postcode) A contact number / email address ​ My team and I receive a large number of enquiries every day, and we always do our best to respond as soon as possible. Urgent or time-sensitive cases are prioritised. ​ If you need urgent help ​ If you need immediate assistance or your enquiry relates to local council services, you may find the following contact numbers useful: Emergency & Support Services NHS (non-emergency): 111 Nottinghamshire Police (non-emergency): 101 Nottinghamshire Domestic Abuse & Sexual Violence Helpline: 0808 800 0340 Childline: 0800 1111 Local Councils Nottinghamshire County Council: 0300 500 8080 Ashfield District Council: 01623 457389 Gedling Borough Council: 0115 901 3901 Newark and Sherwood District Council: 01636 650000 ​ My Commitment ​ I’m proud to represent the people of Sherwood Forest and am here to help with issues involving government departments, local services, and other matters that affect our community. ​ If you’re a resident of Sherwood Forest, please don’t hesitate to reach out. ​ ​ ​ Sign up to my newsletter bottom of page

Contact Details Surgery meetings are by appointment only. You can contact me by email, phone or post. My team and I receive a large number of enquiries every day, and we always do our best to respond as soon as possible. Urgent or time-sensitive cases are prioritised.
